description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named CI Upstream that runs on pushes to main, on pull requests to main, on a daily schedule, and manually. The workflow detects if a specific keyword is present in the commit message or PR title, and if so, triggers a job to test the upstream-dev environment with Python 3.10 using conda and pytest. If the test fails, it uploads the logs as an artifact. If the workflow runs on a schedule and the test fails, it reports the failures to an existing or new GitHub issue labeled with CI.
